text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF National Death Index Segment Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 2.6 
4 
ENRL_SRC 
LABEL: 
Enrollment Source 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the source of enrollment data. 
SHORT NAME: ENRL_SRC 
LONG NAME: ENRL_SRC 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
3 
SOURCE: 
CCW 
VALUES: 
EDB = CMS Enrollment Database 
CME = CMS Common Medicare Environment 
COMMENT: 
The Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) has updated the Medicare enrollment source
